vulnerability.title: Verify Permissions on Backup shadow File
vulnerability.description: To properly set the permissions of /etc/shadow-, run the command: $ sudo chmod 0000 /etc/shadow-

triage_decision.reason: This finding addresses file permissions on a backup of the shadow file, which is a standard security hardening measure. The remediation involves setting restrictive permissions (0000) on /etc/shadow-, which is a safe operation that does not affect system functionality or user access.
